---
title: "Meta Reward Models"
description: "Learn to autonomously construct reward functions for arbitrary tasks, then instantiate RLVR loops — a meta-level system that figures out *what* to reward, not just *how* to optimize."
date: "2026-03-06"
categories: [rl]
status: "exploring"
---

## Motivation

Why is this worth pursuing? What gap does it fill?

## Core Idea

Describe the approach. Include equations, pseudocode, or diagrams as needed.

## Open Questions

-

## Potential Experiments

-

## Related Work

-
